"C:\Program Files\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a
E:\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -w -DWIN32 -D_WINDOWS -DFLAC__NO_DLL -DFLAC__STATIC_BUILD -DLIB_ZPLAY_DYNAMIC -DLIB_ZPLAY_EXPORT_WITH_DEF_FILE -g -DNDEBUG -Os -mcrtdll=ucrt -fpermissive -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_fine\src_x64\src\libzplay.def -mcrtdll=ucrt -s -Wl,--gc-sections -o E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_fine\out\mingw\UCRT\x64\release\-Os\bin\libzplay.dll -Wl,--out-implib,E:\libzplay_final_merge\out_fine\out\mingw\UCRT\x64\release\-Os\lib\liblibzplay.dll.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\zplay_shared.dir\linkLibs.rsp
